evals.prompt: We're a B2B SaaS company launching in Japan with a ¥500,000/month ad budget. Where should we spend it?
evals.expected_output: Should check for product-marketing-context.md. Should recommend a budget allocation across platforms, prioritizing Google Search for high-intent capture. Should mention Yahoo Ads as important for Japan's older demographics. Should discuss whether LINE Ads makes sense for B2B. Should provide a concrete allocation with rationale, not just general advice.
assertions: Provides specific budget allocation with JPY amounts
Recommends Google Search as primary for B2B high-intent
Addresses Yahoo Ads for Japan market
Discusses LINE Ads relevance for B2B
Includes scaling rules or next steps

evals.prompt: Help me set up Google Ads for the Japanese market. I've never run ads in Japan before.
evals.expected_output: Should cover Japan-specific setup: Japanese ad copy character limits, keyword match type strategy for Japanese, negative keyword categories (無料, 求人, とは), and why dual-platform (Google + Yahoo) matters. Should recommend starting with exact/phrase match. Should address Smart Bidding requirements (30+ conversions).
assertions: Covers Japanese character limits for ad copy

evals.prompt: Should we run LINE Ads? We're an e-commerce brand selling skincare products to Japanese women in their 20s-30s.
evals.expected_output: Should strongly recommend LINE Ads for this use case (B2C, mass-market, Japan, target demographic). Should detail LINE's reach (95M+ users), ad formats suitable for skincare (image, video, carousel), targeting options (demographic, interest, lookalike). Should also mention Instagram as complementary. Should provide practical setup steps.
assertions: Recommends LINE Ads for this B2C use case
Recommends specific ad formats for skincare

evals.prompt: Our Google Ads CPA is too high. We're spending ¥300,000/month but only getting 5 conversions. How do we fix this?
evals.expected_output: Should diagnose systematically: check conversion tracking accuracy, review search terms for irrelevant clicks, audit negative keywords, evaluate keyword match types, check landing page relevance, review Quality Score. Should calculate current CPA (¥60,000) and discuss whether this is viable for the business. Should NOT just recommend increasing budget.
assertions: Reviews search terms and negative keywords
Evaluates Quality Score and landing page

evals.prompt: Write Google Ads copy for our project management tool targeting Japanese businesses.
evals.expected_output: Should recognize this overlaps with the ad-creative skill. Should provide basic ad copy guidance (headlines, descriptions within character limits) but defer to ad-creative for bulk creative generation and iteration.
assertions: Provides basic ad copy within Japanese character limits
Defers to ad-creative for comprehensive creative work
Includes Japanese trust signals in copy examples
